displayName: Adverse Action Notice (ECOA + FCRA, to the subject)
description: Credit-ECOA mirror. The combined ECOA §1002.9 + FCRA §615(a) adverse-action notice issued to the applicant on a credit decline. This is the mirror of the KYC inverted notice: where keystone-regulatory-report-v1 withholds from the subject and notifies the regulator, this notice is required to the subject with specific reasons. Notarize-only, and the recipe's Notify subscriptions deliver this type to a customer endpoint. principalReasons are unconditionally required and capped at 4 (Reg B: more than 4 'is not likely to be helpful'; boilerplate like 'failed to achieve a qualifying score' does not satisfy the rule). When a score was used, the FCRA score block (creditScore/scoreRange/keyFactors/scoreDate plus CRA contact) is required so the disclosure is complete. Issued within 30 days of a completed application (deployment timing obligation).

verdictRef.description: recordId of the keystone-underwriting-verdict-v1 (or auto keystone-credit-decision-v1) the notice reports.

creditorName.description: Name (and address, in deployment) of the creditor — ECOA §1002.9(a)(2).

principalReasons.description: Specific principal reasons for the decline (ECOA §1002.9(b)(2)); 1-4, specific not boilerplate.

ecoaStatement.description: Affirms the ECOA anti-discrimination statement and federal-agency disclosure are included (§1002.9(a)(2)). const:true: an issued adverse-action notice that records the ECOA statement was not included is not a valid notice, and the schema refuses it (the federalAgency disclosure it affirms is then required, below).

federalAgency.description: The federal agency that administers ECOA compliance for this creditor (§1002.9(b)(1)). Required — ecoaStatement affirms this disclosure is present.

scoreUsed.description: true if a credit score was used — triggers the FCRA §615 score-disclosure block.

creditScore.description: FCRA: the numerical score used (required when scoreUsed).

keyFactors.description: FCRA: up to 4 key factors (+1 for inquiries) that adversely affected the score, in order of effect.

craName.description: FCRA §615(a): CRA name (and that it did not make the decision; consumer's free-report + dispute rights — affirmed in deployment).

craContact.description: FCRA: CRA address/phone for the consumer to obtain the free report / dispute.

scoreDate.description: FCRA: the date the score was created.
